steps.title: Use the tradition context
steps.content: The passage describes a rich Hawaiian literary tradition and says Keoni Lau has produced acclaimed works within it. The blank must mean that his works have made his position in that tradition firm or secure.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: A means removed or freed, B means thought about, and C means undermined. Those meanings do not fit a writer establishing his place through acclaimed work. The answer is D.
